BCA.message: Good morning Team! Please log your headcounts for Zone A and B now. 👷‍♂️

Alert: Concrete levels are low for tomorrow's pour. @Miyu, have we approved the PO for the next delivery? 🚛
Miyu says casting is done at Block A. I need a photo to verify the finish quality! 📸
